detail: US/Western political figures (e.g. Lincoln melancholy, Churchill arcs) excluded from zh_CN cluster per EXTERNAL_STORIES_BANK_SPEC §3 — mirror quote bank Western political icon policy.
Saint-or-scripture anxiety relief anecdotes excluded from secular zh_CN brands even when historically attested.
9/11 and similar collective trauma stories permitted only as attributed paraphrase without graphic detail or invented survivor dialogue.
過労死 entries must cite public policy/labor statistics; no sensationalized individual death recreation.
Films depicting mental illness (e.g. A Beautiful Mind) are nominative_reference only; must not be presented as diagnostic guidance in secular therapeutic register.
